description_long: This is a large, cylindrical wooden barrel with a slightly convex top and bottom, constructed from vertical wooden staves held together by three wide, metallic hoops. The wood is weathered, showing a natural grain and some darkened areas, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. One side of the barrel features a rectangular white label bordered in black, with partially legible text reading 'Cooper Shipping CO.' The metallic hoops are dull and slightly tarnished, indicating they are likely made of galvanized steel or iron. The top and bottom surfaces are made of the same wood as the sides, with visible circular wood grain patterns. The overall appearance is rustic and utilitarian, suitable for storage or transport in an urban or industrial setting.
description: A large, weathered wooden barrel with metal hoops and a shipping label, showing signs of age and use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white shipping label and the full curvature of the wooden staves and metal hoops.
description_view_1: Side view with no label visible, highlighting the continuous wood grain and three metal hoops.
description_view_2: Rear view with plain wooden staves and metal hoops, no label or markings present.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the edge of the label and the transition between two metal hoops.
